page.title: Users
page.subtitle: Admin-only identity and Auth0 linkage surfaces.
page.placeholder: User identity/access implementation is not available.

help.displayName: Human-readable user name shown in admin screens.
help.timezone: Defaults to the Vietnam business timezone for new users.
help.authSubjectRequired: Links this user to an external Auth0 identity. Required by the current backend contract and must match the external subject exactly.
help.authSubjectExact: Must match the external Auth0 identity subject exactly.
help.provisionEmail: The backend provisions the Auth0 account and invite flow for this email.
help.employmentProfileLater: Employment Profile selection is handled in a later flow; this form only provisions the internal user account.

detail.boundaryNotice: User screens manage identity profile, preferences, lifecycle, and Auth0 metadata only. Role assignment is owned by Role detail, and Employment Profile linkage is owned by Employment Profile.

create.title: Create user
create.subtitle: Creates a pending admin-runtime user identity.

provision.title: Provision account
provision.subtitle: Creates the internal user and asks the backend to create or link Auth0 with an invite/password setup flow.

update.title: Update profile and preferences
update.subtitle: Only changed supported profile and preference fields are submitted.

validation.noChangedFields: Change at least one supported field.
validation.passwordSetupRequiresLinked: Password setup requires a linked Auth0 identity.

confirm.activate: Activate this user if backend blockers allow it.
confirm.disable: Disable this user. The backend may reject current-actor or governance recovery blockers.
confirm.archive: Archive this user. Active users cannot be archived.
confirm.unlinkAuth0: Unlink Auth0 for this user. The account may remain pending or unlinked until backend lifecycle rules allow activation.

provisionResult.title: Provision result
provisionResult.pendingUntilActivated: Account will remain pending until activated.

states.emptyMessage: Adjust filters or create a user.
states.loadErrorMessage: The user surface could not be loaded.
